parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-1 per-exercise e1RM parity — insufficient-history boundary. ONE completed push-a bench-press session (two sets at 60 kg, reps 6). With < 3 high-quality recent candidates the engine takes the single_recent_low_confidence path: current is forced low-confidence (with the 'data insufficient' note), best falls back to a medium-confidence candidate. Pins the lower boundary of the per-exercise estimate (forced-low current + method='single_recent_low_confidence'). FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic history via makeSession (push-a / bench-press). One session daysAgo 2, two sets at 60 kg => 2 recent high-quality candidates (< 3) => stableCurrentValue = min(recentValues), current forced 'low', method 'single_recent_low_confidence'.
